title: Relatório de Torneios por Sessão (não por torneio individual)
plan: Refactor src/analyzers/tournament.py: add _get_session_sparkline() to aggregate cumulative net across all tournaments in a day, add _get_daily_notable_hands() to find biggest win/loss across all tournaments of each day, add session-level ROI calculation, and update get_daily_reports() to include these new fields in the daily report dict

Refactor src/reports/tournament_report.py _render_daily_report(): restructure layout so session summary is the primary view with aggregated stats (VPIP/PFR/AF) with health badges as headline, financial summary (invested/won/net/ROI/ITM), session sparkline, and day-level notable hands

Add new rendering functions in tournament_report.py: _render_session_header() for date+net+ROI+ITM, _render_session_summary_stats() for day-level stats with health badges, _render_session_sparkline() for aggregated sparkline, _render_session_notable_hands() for best/worst hands of the day

Demote individual tournament details into accordion: keep existing _render_tournament_card() but wrap in accordion that defaults to collapsed, adjust CSS to make accordion a secondary 'details' section
Add session-level EV analysis display in _render_daily_report() using existing EV data aggregated at the day level
Add session comparison section: identify best session of the month by net/ROI and render comparison badges
Create tests/test_tournament_session_report.py: test session sparkline aggregation, day-level ROI calculation, daily notable hands selection, and HTML rendering structure
Run quality gates: typecheck, lint, tests, build verification
